name: reliable-ai-skills
description: Marketplace for the Reliable AI Skills library: production-derived Claude Code skills with a blinded A/B eval harness and pre-registered results.

plugins.name: reliable-ai-skills
plugins.description: 17 production-derived Claude Code skills for reliable AI engineering: adversarial and tiered review, validation gates, cost and safety guardrails, deploy campaigns, debugging playbooks, and change control, each shipped with the blinded A/B eval harness that tests whether a skill actually changes agent behavior.
